case_title: SOPHIA REVELLI et al VS. ALBERT S. TAM et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TAM, ALBERT S.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-13-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT REVELLI, SOPHIA VIRDEN, TYLER RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TAM, ALBERT S. LO, CONNIE H. $1,175.90 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $160.00 COSTS, $193.50 $43.50 INTEREST PLUS $150 UNDER CCP 116.780(C)(2), TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,779.40, ($250.00 ATTORNEY FEES PER LEASE). THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 1/24/2014. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:21am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Jean Kong, D525, Not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Alber S. Tam, appears in pro per, no appearance by Connie H. Lo; Respondent, Sophia Revelli and Tyler Virden, appears in pro per with witness Clare Revelli. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
